title: Unified Generative Video Project Package
description: Tool-agnostic, Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema for autonomous generative-AI video production. Merges video-project-schema-v2.json (session-02) and generative_video_project_package_schema.json with all 14 review defects resolved. Schema version 3.0.0.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version — SemVer. D1 fix: was const:1.0.0, now typed SemVer. Current: 3.0.0

qualityProfiles.description: Reusable quality profiles. All entities reference these by ID — no inline embedding.

dependencies.description: Explicit typed DAG. Cycle-free; validated by dependency-resolver skill.

Identifier.description: Opaque, stable identifier. Never reused. Rule 10.

ISOTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 with UTC offset required. Rule 6.

FuzzyDate.description: Temporal uncertainty representation. Rejects false precision. G9 addition from session-02.

label.description: Human-readable when kind=approximate or unknown. E.g. 'late Q3 2026'

state.description: Merged lifecycle from both source schemas.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex of canonical JSON. Required when state=published if policy.requireContentHashForPublished=true

VersionSelector.description: How to resolve an EntityRef to a concrete version.

value.description: Semver range, tag name, or branch name depending on mode

EntityRef.description: Cross-entity foreign key. Rule 13. Either exact id or logical id + selector.

id.description: x-immutable: true. Exact versioned entity ID.

logicalId.description: Stable conceptual ID, resolved via versionSelector.

role.description: Semantic role of this reference in context.

ApprovalRecord.description: Per-role approval record with deadline enforcement. From session-02.

timecodeRef.description: Position in timeline this comment refers to.

entityRef.description: The entity this comment is attached to if different from parent.

parentCommentId.description: Thread parent. Topology: DAG (no cycles). Rule 14.

Resolution.description: Rule 7: px unit in field names.

QualityProfile.description: Reusable quality specification. Referenced by ID from entities. D4 fix: never embedded inline.

ValidationRule.description: Rule 2: constraints in schema. D2 fix: targetValue typed union.

targetValue.description: D2 fix: was {} (universal schema). Now typed union.

expression.description: JSONPath or CEL expression for complex rules.

QCResult.description: D3 fix: actualValue and expectedValue typed union.

QaCheck.description: Per-check result within a QaGate. From session-02.

QaGate.description: Quality gate on scenes and shots. Blocks assembly when overallPass=false. From session-02.

overallPass.description: x-computed: true. Derived from checks vs passThreshold.

NamingConventions.description: G7 fix: was fully open additionalProperties:true. Now typed structure.

idPrefix.description: Prefix applied to all generated identifiers.

GenerationCost.description: G4 fix: cost tracking absent from original schema. From session-02.

RetryConfig.description: G5 fix: per-step retry config absent from original. From session-02.

fallbackTool.description: Provider/tool string to use if all retries fail.

AsyncConfig.description: G5 fix: async orchestration config for long-running gen calls. From session-02.

PromptFragment.description: G3 fix: replaces flat string[] with composable, ordered, weighted fragments.

weight.description: Attention weight for models that support it.

locked.description: Locked fragments are not modified by prompt-engineer skill.

PromptRecord.description: Immutable prompt version record. Full audit trail. From session-02.

ConsistencyAnchor.description: lockLevel is 3-valued. Binary bool of session-02 v2 replaced by soft/medium/hard.

lockLevel.description: soft=advisory, medium=warn on violation, hard=block generation.

GenerationStep.description: Single generation call record. G4+G5 additions: costEstimate, costActual, retryConfig, asyncConfig. promptHistory for full audit trail.

BaseEntity.description: D4 fix: qualityProfile inline embed removed. Now qualityProfileRef → EntityRef → QualityProfileEntity. Comments and approvalChain added. Rule 24: id and logicalId are x-immutable.

logicalId.description: x-immutable: true. Stable conceptual ID across versions.

qualityProfileRef.description: D4 fix: replaces inline qualityProfile embed. Points to qualityProfiles[].

scheduledStartDate.description: G9 addition: FuzzyDate for uncertain schedules.

allOf.description: D5 fix: runtimeHardLimitSec const removed. Maximum enforced on targetRuntimeSec.

targetRuntimeSec.description: D5 fix: hard 1800s (30min) limit enforced here, not via const field.

defaultQualityProfileRef.description: Points to qualityProfiles[]. D4 fix: never inline.

scheduledRange.description: G9: uncertain production schedule for this beat.

qualityRules.description: Director-level quality rules propagated to QaGates.

ManimConfig.description: Manim CE scene configuration for procedural animation. From session-02 CinematicSpec.

CinematicSpec.description: Merged ShotTechnicalSpec (new schema) + CinematicSpec (session-02). Formal shot tuple Ξ = (F, T, α, p, R, L, A_sub) per claude-20-styles-camera-v1.0.md.

focalLengthMm.description: Rule 7: mm. Part of formal shot tuple α.

hyperfocalDistanceM.description: Rule 7: metres. Paraxial optics: H = f²/(Nc).

fieldOfViewDeg.description: Rule 7: degrees. AoV from focal length.

temporalBridgeAnchorRef.description: Temporal bridge pattern: anchor_frame_ref conditions generation on last frame of preceding shot. Session-02 core pattern.

canonicalPromptFragments.description: G3 fix: was string[]. Now PromptFragment[] with weight, insertionOrder, category, locked.

beat.description: Musical beat position. Enables beat-locked editing.

AssemblyHints.description: Direct hints for MoviePy/Movis compositor. From new schema.

qaGate.description: Scene-level QA gate. Blocks assembly when overallPass=false.

allOf.description: cinematicSpec replaces technicalSpec (was ShotTechnicalSpec). genParams added for per-shot generation. qaGate added.

genParams.description: Inline shot-level generation parameters. Full record including cost, retry, async.

allOf.description: G8 fix: storyRef and originatingHook added to close story→marketing provenance chain.

originatingHook.description: G8 fix: maps to StoryEntity.marketingHooks[] value.

allOf.description: LUTs, subtitles, fonts, ControlNet models, custom artifacts.
MoviePy: concatenate_videoclips(). Rule 8: opType discriminator.
Movis/MoviePy composite layer. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
Apply LUT or color grade. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
MoviePy: CompositeAudioClip(). Rule 8: opType discriminator.
Apply edit transition between two clips. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
OpenCV frame-level filter. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
PyAV/FFmpeg encode. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
Manim CE procedural animation node. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
MoviePy: fx.AccelDecel, PyAV retime. Rule 8: opType discriminator.
Escape hatch for future operations. Rule 8: opType discriminator.

Operation.description: G2 fix: was single object with untyped opType string. Now discriminated oneOf. Rule 8.

StreamBinding.description: PyAV stream/time-base binding. Carries codec-level detail for low-level operations.

allOf.description: Clip/track based edit graph. Layer 1 of 4-layer assembly model.
Versioned cut. Layer 2 of 4-layer assembly model.
Typed operation list + compatible runtimes. Layer 3 of 4-layer assembly model.

Assembly.description: 4-layer assembly model: Timeline → EditVersion → RenderPlan → FinalOutput.

allOf.description: G1 fix: was untyped. Carries full GenerationStep with cost+retry+async.
G1 fix: human-in-the-loop gate.
G1 fix: holds typed Operation.
G1 fix: render execution node.
G1 fix: automated QA node.
G1 fix: notification/event node.
G1 fix: escape hatch for custom node types.

WorkflowNode.description: G1 fix: was single object with untyped nodeType string. Now discriminated oneOf. Rule 8.

condition.description: Boolean expression (CEL/JSONPath) that must evaluate true for edge to activate.

WorkflowGraph.description: DAG of production steps. Rule 14: cycles forbidden (topology constraint declared, validated by dependency-resolver skill).

edges.description: Rule 14: must form a DAG. Cycle detection by dependency-resolver skill.

LocalizationConfig.description: G6 fix: absent from original schema. Rule 25: localization strategy declared.

AccessibilityConfig.description: G6 fix: absent from original schema. WCAG compliance and accessibility asset refs.

allOf.description: G6 fix: localizationTargets, accessibilityConfig, platformDeliveries added. Layer 4 of 4-layer assembly model.

DependencyEdge.description: Typed dependency edge for the project DAG. From session-02. Rule 14: acyclic constraint declared.
